overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city during a rainy night. The journey begins in a covered commercial corridor with digital floor displays, ascends stairs to an open rain-soaked plaza with yellow atmospheric haze, and continues through neon-lit walkways toward a building marked 'El Guapo' with large holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway with digital floor advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through covered corridor with reflective digital floor displays and neon overhead lighting

notable_agents.action: person with backpack walking ahead on the digital floor path

entered.detail: illuminated floor panels showing colorful advertisements and reflections
long linear fluorescent lights running the length of the corridor ceiling
large digital billboards displaying product advertisements on the left wall
mature tree in planter visible at the start of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered commercial corridor with polished marble floors and digital displays. The camera moves forward through a semi-enclosed space illuminated by overhead neon strips, passing wall-mounted advertisements and a large potted tree. Pedestrians walk ahead on the reflective digital floor panels.

scene_state.functional_zone: stairwell transition from covered walkway to open plaza

events.description: begins ascending concrete stairs from the covered commercial corridor
approaching bright exit portal with intense yellow light and visible rain atmosphere

agents.ego_description: climbing wide concrete stairs toward the open plaza above, following other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person holding a glowing red umbrella ascending the stairs ahead

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with metal handrails leading upward
intensely lit opening at the top of the stairs showing yellow haze and rain

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from the flat corridor to ascending a concrete stairwell. Metal handrails line both sides as the camera climbs toward a brightly lit exit portal. A pedestrian with a glowing red umbrella walks ahead, and the intense yellow light of the exterior becomes visible through the rain and haze at the top of the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: open rain-soaked plaza with benches and atmospheric haze

events.description: exits covered stairwell into open plaza with heavy rain and yellow-green atmospheric haze
passing plaza benches where pedestrians sit sheltered under trees in the rain

agents.ego_description: walking through open plaza in heavy rain, navigating around pedestrians with glowing umbrellas

notable_agents.action: person carrying a large yellow glowing umbrella walking ahead
person sitting on bench under tree shelter from the rain

entered.detail: large illuminated sign for 'El Guapo' building visible in the distance through haze
concrete benches lining the walkway where pedestrians sit
heavy rainfall visible throughout the open air with water pooling on ground
bright yellow-green atmospheric haze covering the sky and reducing visibility

segments.scene_description: Exiting the stairwell, the scene opens into a wide plaza exposed to heavy rain and yellow atmospheric haze. The camera walks across wet paved tiles reflecting neon lights, passing benches where people shelter under trees. The 'El Guapo' building sign is visible in the distance through the haze, and pedestrians with glowing umbrellas move through the rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial plaza under El Guapo building with holographic advertisements

events.description: approaching the El Guapo building entrance with large holographic signage becoming prominent
entering covered walkway under El Guapo with intense pink and cyan neon billboard lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through the commercial plaza toward and under the El Guapo building entrance, passing various pedestrians

notable_agents.action: woman in yellow dress with red hair walking with an umbrella

entered.detail: large architectural entranceway to the El Guapo building with prominent signage
large vertical digital screens displaying animated advertisements and brand logos
tropical palm trees planted in the plaza approaching the entrance
overhead concrete structure providing shelter from the rain

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the El Guapo building entrance, moving from the open plaza into a semi-covered commercial walkway. Large holographic advertisement panels line the walls with intense pink and cyan neon lighting. Palm trees mark the entrance plaza, and the covered ceiling provides shelter from the rain. The El Guapo signage becomes more prominent as the camera moves closer and passes underneath the building's overhang.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a polished indoor commercial corridor into a rain-soaked, neon-lit cyberpunk plaza. It begins by gliding through a semi-enclosed space of marble floors and digital displays, passing wall-mounted advertisements and a potted tree. As the camera transitions from the flat corridor, it ascends a concrete stairwell guided by metal handrails, following a pedestrian with a glowing red umbrella toward an intense yellow light. The scene then opens into a wide, rain-drenched plaza filled with atmospheric haze and reflective tiles, moving past sheltered benches toward the distant El Guapo building. Finally, the camera shifts from the open rain into a semi-covered walkway lined with pink and cyan holographic panels and palm trees, passing under the building's overhang as the El Guapo signage becomes prominent.
